# INMediaReference.my

**Case**

Indicates that the specified content belongs to the user.

## Declaration

```swift
case my
```

## Getting the Reference Status

- **INMediaReference.unknown**: Indicates that the media item is unknown.
- **INMediaReference.currentlyPlaying**: Indicates that the user is referring to the media item which is currently playing.

items.description: Indicates that the media item is unknown.
items.name: INMediaReference.unknown

items.description: Indicates that the user is referring to the media item which is currently playing.
items.name: INMediaReference.currentlyPlaying
